description_long: This object is a rectangular carton of LACNOR Essentials Apricot Nectar, featuring a dark blue background with vibrant images of ripe apricots on the front and side panels. The front panel displays the product name in both English and Arabic, along with a prominent image of halved apricots showing their orange flesh and brown pits. The side panels contain nutritional information and product details in both English and Arabic, printed in white and yellow text. The top of the carton is sealed with a white plastic screw cap, which is slightly raised and positioned off-center. The carton is designed to hold 1 liter of liquid and is made primarily of laminated cardboard with a glossy finish. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and visually appealing, suitable for display in urban retail environments.
description: A rectangular, glossy carton of LACNOR Apricot Nectar with vivid apricot imagery and a white plastic cap, labeled in English and Arabic.
description_view_0: Side view showing nutritional information and product details in blue and white text, with the cap partially visible.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the Arabic product name and a large image of apricots, with the cap and top edge visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with additional product information in Arabic, and the brand logo near the top.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the LACNOR logo, 'ESSENTIALS APRICOT NECTAR' text, and a prominent image of halved apricots.
